task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the correct location of the Itaipu Dam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Satellite imagery showing the Itaipu Dam (massive hydroelectric structure on a river) at coordinates approx -25.4085, -54.5890.

task_completion.description: Agent activates a distance measurement tool within the mapping application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler tool, 'Measure distance' context menu, or measurement interface is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Agent draws the measurement line specifically along the main concrete dam crest, excluding earthfill embankments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement line covers the central grey concrete structure (intakes/spillways) but stops before the long, sloped earth/rockfill wings on either side.

task_completion.description: The measured distance displayed on screen is accurate for the concrete section (approx 1,064m).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement tool displays a length between 900 meters and 1,200 meters. Values significantly larger (e.g., >2,000m) indicate incorrect inclusion of embankments.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the measurement text file and the screenshot to the specified paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands or GUI dialogs showing the saving of '/home/ga/dam_measurement.txt' and '/home/ga/dam_screenshot.png'.

integrity.description: Agent must use a visual mapping tool to perform the measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Google Maps, Google Earth, or similar GIS software, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent manually plots the measurement points on the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor or markers appearing on the dam structure during the measurement process.

integrity.description: Agent does not simply search for the answer text online.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser tabs showing search queries like 'Itaipu dam concrete crest length' used to copy-paste the number without measuring.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Itaipu Dam is located at -25.4085, -54.5890. The main concrete crest length is exactly 1,064 meters. The total dam length including earthfill is 7,919 meters. The measurement should only cover the central concrete section (grey, industrial structure), not the extensive earth/rockfill wings (sloped, often grassy). A correct measurement will be near 1.06 km; a measurement near 7.9 km is incorrect.
